creator: lab+bsd@thinkum.space
text:
Created attachment 235622
patch - Adding options for docs, tools

This diff is based on the changeset 305f148f482d in git @ FreeBSD ports
circa  2021-04-06 13:55:50 +0200 for x11-toolkits/libwnck3
version 3.36.0

Options added:

- DOCS: Build and install the Libwnck Reference Manual

  For a purpose of easing maintenance, gtk-doc files installed to
  the gtk-doc dir will automatically be added to the plist with
  add-plist-docs

  The project's NEWS file will be installed under the DOCS
  option. This file is added to pkg-plist

- TOOLS: Build and install the wnckprop and wnck-urgency-monitor command line tools
